{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/22666538?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/omkhar", "id": 22666538, "login": "omkhar", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIyNjY2NTM4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/omkhar", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54518", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary
`UnwrappedPropertyHandler.processUnwrappedCreatorProperties()` replays buffered JSON into creator parameters but never consults `prop.visibleInView(activeView)`. The normal property-based creator path gates creator properties on the active view, but this unwrapped-creator replay path bypasses that check, so a constructor parameter annotated with both `@JsonView(AdminView.class)` and `@JsonUnwrapped` is populated from attacker JSON even when a more restrictive view is active.

## Impact
View-restricted unwrapped creator parameters can be set from untrusted input where `@JsonView` is used as a write-side authorization boundary.

## Affected / Patched (verified via `git tag --contains`)
- 2.21 line: `>= 2.21.0, < 2.21.4` -> fixed in **2.21.4** (backport `721fa07`, #5973)
- 3.x line: `>= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4` -> fixed in **3.1.4** (#5971, `d633bc0`)

## Severity / CWE
Maintainer: minor. Reporter: HIGH. CWE-863 (Incorrect Authorization); related CWE-284.

## Credits
Omkhar Arasaratnam (@omkhar) - finder.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00211, "percentile": 0.11314}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rcqc-6cw3-h962", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T21:17:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rcqc-6cw3-h962", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rcqc-6cw3-h962"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54518"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T21:17:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security/advisories/GHSA-rcqc-6cw3-h962", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/pull/5971", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/pull/5973", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/commit/721fa07ebbd4aab4a659a1a68940878315c3e341", "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind/commit/d633bc038f200c1397c07f1a2b46f58e72c91eea", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rcqc-6cw3-h962"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FasterXML/jackson-databind/security-advisories/GHSA-rcqc-6cw3-h962", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-databind", "summary": "jackson-databind has a @JsonView bypass for unwrapped creator parameters", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T21:17:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rcqc-6cw3-h962", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.21.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.21.0, < 2.21.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "tools.jackson.core:jackson-databind"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: jackson-databind has a @JsonView bypass for unwrapped creator parameters
